seo_title: The Well | Minimalist Wellness Retreat in Palm Springs
seo_description: Where minimalism feels like a hug. 1-bedroom wellness retreat in Palm Springs with clean lines, warm wood, teal velvet couch. Visual rest for design lovers sensitive to overwhelm. Book direct, save 15%.
tagline: Where minimalism feels like a hug.
description_heading: Settle In. Clear Your Head. Leave Feeling Well.
description_p1: The Well was designed for the traveler who needs a reset and doesn't want to work for it. Walk in, set your bag down, and the space does the rest. Clean lines, warm wood, no clutter asking for your attention. No brainwork required.
description_p2: Southwestern minimalism through a mid-century modern lens: meditative line motifs, quality goods chosen to stand out rather than fill space. Thoughtful storage keeps everything organized and accessible. The teal velvet couch is exactly as good as it looks. The kind of considered space you'd want to have people over in.
description_p3: One bedroom. Sleeps two. The kitchen is stocked and functional: real home cooking territory. House slippers cushion your feet on tiled flooring. A curated local restaurant guide doubles as a cookbook inspired by Palm Springs favorites. The outdoor space is yours for weekend exploring or sharing a meal under the desert sky.
description_p4: Every guest of The Well leaves saying some version of the same thing: not just rested, but clear-headed, grounded, and better for having been here. That's what we built it for.
